backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining product and tarot service management with CRUD operations, including types for products (crystals, bracelets, pendulums) and tarot services (categorized by reading type), with pricing logic and filtering queries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features for redesigning the Services section with card-based layouts and category grouping, both implemented in Services.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of all frontend files including components, data files, utilities, and configuration, describing the mystical-themed tarot reading and crystal shop application structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode CSS variables for mystical theme colors and UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, page title, and root div for the Mystic Moon with Ishita React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component rendering the full single-page application layout with Header, Hero, About, Services, ServicesGallery, Reviews, ProductCatalog, and Footer sections on a mystical gradient background.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component featuring Ishita's profile with healer portrait image, highlighting her 4 years of tarot reading experience, intuitive abilities, and crystal healing expertise in a card-based layout with mystical icons.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with three-column layout displaying business info, services list, shop categories, Instagram link, copyright notice, and caffeine.ai attribution with mystical purple/rose theming.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component displaying the Mystic Moon with Ishita logo as a clickable button that scrolls to page top, with responsive sizing and backdrop blur effect.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component with animated gradient backgrounds, sparkle icons, and call-to-action buttons for exploring services and shopping crystals.
frontend/src/components/ImportantNotes.t: Displays four important service notes (delivery time, format options, restrictions, confidentiality) in a grid of cards with emoji icons.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Reusable product card component that displays product image, name, description, type badge, and formatted price with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Product catalog section with tabbed filtering (all, crystals, bracelets, pendulums) that displays products in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Client testimonials section displaying reviews in a responsive grid with star ratings, scrollable text, and category badges.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Tarot reading services section that fetches service catalog from backend actor and displays categorized services with pricing and Instagram booking link.
Gallery component displaying service images in a responsive grid with hover effects and a call-to-action button linking to Instagram.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Product data file defining the Product interface and exporting an array of crystal, bracelet, and pendulum products with details and image paths.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: Defines a Review interface and exports an array of 15+ customer reviews for tarot sessions and crystal purchases, including name, text, date, and category fields.
frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.t: Defines ServiceGalleryImage interface and exports an array mapping service categories (Mini Readings, Love & Relationship, Career/Money/Life, etc.) to their corresponding image paths.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating products and tarot services from the backend, including queries for filtering by type/category and mutations for add/update/delete operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including a mystical color palette (purple, rose, gold, cream) and imports Google Fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/utils/pricing.ts: Utility functions for calculating final product prices (base price + ₹400 markup) and formatting prices as Indian Rupees with proper locale formatting.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space (including mystic-themed colors), container settings, border radius variables, custom animations for accordions, and importing typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting two existing features for redesigning a tarot reading services section with card-based layouts, category grouping, and one pending feature request to update the service section format.
